title: Chroma Match Puzzle
description: An ultra-premium colometric perception trainer built around procedural color variance mathematics and micro-second state loops. Running cleanly inside native browser layout boundaries, the platform models subtle color mutations by applying algorithmic HSL delta steps to construct three decoy cards that closely mirror a central hex specimen target. Features include a Fisher-Yates array shuffling loop mapping choice slots randomly each round, an integrated 5-second linear countdown timer loop, and persistent score caching via LocalStorage vectors.
